caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, conical wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a black microphone. He is dressed in a white collared shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. The background consists of a white wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing displays, including a garment labeled "LEE". To the left and right of the man, on-screen logos featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, continuing to speak with slight movements of his head and mouth. By the final frame, he begins to gesture with his right hand toward the bottom left of the scene. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the clip, emphasizing the interior studio environment.
